allow: Bash(git commit -m 'add package-lock.json for CI builds *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: uncomment welcome view route *)
Bash(git commit -m 'add UserSeeder with test user, run seed on deploy *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix seeders: skip if data already exists *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix factories: replace fake\(\) with $this->faker-> for production compatibility *)
Bash(git commit -m 'move fakerphp/faker to require so seeders work in production *)
Bash(git commit -m 'update composer.lock: move faker to production packages *)
